Video.summary: Tony is pursued by a woman he suspects is filing false complaints.
Video.title: Behind The Storm Door

Video.summary: The commissioner sets out to trap a serial rapist in a Santa Claus mask who's been terrorizing the city.
Video.title: Do You See What I See?

Image.alt: Do You See What I See?
Do You See What I See?
Do You See What I See?
Do You See What I See?
Do You See What I See?
Do You See What I See?
Do You See What I See?

Video.summary: After receiving a pair of baffling death threats, Tony initiates around-the-clock surveillance of his unsuspecting family.
Video.title: Nothing To Fear But...

Video.summary: Tony initiates a sweep to find a pair of missing cops.
Video.title: A Matter Of Life Or Death

Image.alt: A Matter Of Life Or Death
A Matter Of Life Or Death
A Matter Of Life Or Death
A Matter Of Life Or Death
A Matter Of Life Or Death
A Matter Of Life Or Death
A Matter Of Life Or Death

Video.summary: Rachel refuses to believe Tony when he tells her that her school teacher colleague is a child molester.
Video.title: The Poisoned Tree

Video.summary: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation
Video.title: Endless Summer

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby learn to never underestimate the power of a woman when they encounter a beautiful, young bail jumper, wanted in San Diego for assaulting an officer and resisting arrest.
Video.title: Bonnie And Claire

Video.summary: After tailing robber Nicky Griffin for two years, Bobby and Cheyenne are able to link the man and his proficient get-away drivers to the stock car racing circuit through his most recent heist of a local bank
Video.title: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Image.alt: Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche
Wheel Man / Wheel Men Don't Eat Quiche

Video.summary: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines
Video.title: Windy City Blues

Video.summary: When a distinguished municipal judge awakes after an intimate evening to find his "date" murdered during the night, he must pay the price to the club owner who is willing to help him cover up the incident.
Video.title: Honor Bound

Video.summary: When a UNLV coed is kidnapped following a frat party, Bobby is hired by her father to deliver the two million dollar ransom and ensure the 18-year-old honor student's safe return.
Video.title: Hard Rider

Video.summary: Chris and Rita confront a bizarre burglary ring involving the mob, murder and Chris' quirky snitch Dunn.
Video.title: Hot Rocks

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the murder of an up-and-coming young tennis champ's stepfather.
Video.title: Love-15

Video.summary: The murder of a wealthy Guatemalan businessman takes on serious international implications.
Video.title: Scorpio Lover

Video.summary: Michael and Holly question a battered woman's story after her abusive husband is murdered.
Video.title: Black And Blue

Video.summary: Holly goes undercover as an actress to solve a theater star's death.
Video.title: Exit Dying

Video.summary: A fashion model's murder uncovers a noted lawyer's clever extortion scheme.
Video.title: Prey Of The Fox

Video.summary: Holly and Michael are sent undercover to a drug rehab clinic in search of a deadly killer.
Video.title: Playing Doctor

Video.summary: In the midst of his campaign for governor, a politician's son is accused of murder.
Video.title: Family Values

Video.summary: A man who was going to turn his money to his wife leaving his children out is killed. And naturally the investigation focuses on the children.
Video.title: Private Dancer

Video.summary: After saving a neighbor from her violent ex-husband, Michael finds himself being accused of murder.
Video.title: Body Electric

Video.summary: When Reno stands trial for the murder of Buzzy Burrell, his quest for justice is complicated by Lt. Dutch Dixon who plans to insure that Reno never makes it to court alive.
Video.title: The Trial Of Reno Raines

Video.summary: As Reno waits out his pending appeal for murder, he is transfered to Paso Perdido Penitentiary where he finds himself in danger from the prison population as well as the law.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: When Reno is saved during a bar fight by a man strongly resembling Elvis Presley, he attempts to track down "the King" to express his thanks as well as satisfy his curiosity.
Video.title: The King And I

Video.summary: Reno goes to the aid of his Karate Master when one of the master's former pupils attacks a San Francisco councilwoman.
Video.title: Black Wind

Video.summary: When Reno goes to New Orleans after cold-blooded murderer, he finds himself the recipient of a "dead man's curse".
Video.title: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Image.alt: Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans
Way Down Yonder In New Orleans

Video.summary: Reno saddles up to help when a friend of Bobby's is injured after uncovering a group of cattle rustlers operating through a traveling rodeo.
Video.title: Rustlers' Rodeo
